jsonLd.title: CONCOR is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Warehouse Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
